stories.headline: Nvidia develops flashmla-etap for accelerating mla inference on nvidia h20 gpus
synopsis: Nvidia has developed FlashMLA-ETAP, a new technique for accelerating MLA inference on Nvidia H20 GPUs, with a 2x speedup.

stories.explanation: Think of it like a highway with more lanes, allowing more cars to travel at the same time, making the journey faster.
